# awscc_bedrock_knowledge_base_policy (Resource)

Definition of AWS::Bedrock::KnowledgeBasePolicy Resource Type



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `knowledge_base_id` (String) The unique identifier of the knowledge base
- `policy_document` (String) The IAM policy document defining access permissions for the knowledge base

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Uniquely identifies the resource.
- `revision_id` (String) The revision identifier for the policy, used for optimistic concurrency control

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

In Terraform v1.12.0 and later, the [`import` block](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/import) can be used with the `identity` attribute, for example:

```terraform
import {
  to = awscc_bedrock_knowledge_base_policy.example
  identity = {
    knowledge_base_id = "knowledge_base_id"
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
### Identity Schema

#### Required

- `knowledge_base_id` (String) The unique identifier of the knowledge base

#### Optional

- `account_id` (String) AWS Account where this resource is managed
- `region` (String) Region where this resource is managed

In Terraform v1.5.0 and later, the [`import` block](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/import) can be used with the `id` attribute, for example:

```terraform
import {
  to = awscc_bedrock_knowledge_base_policy.example
  id = "knowledge_base_id"
}
```

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
$ terraform import awscc_bedrock_knowledge_base_policy.example "knowledge_base_id"
```
